text.title: QA Bug Bash Runbook Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Testers all explore 'whatever' — heavy overlap, missed personas.
antipattern.fix: Issue charters at session start; reassign overlaps before timer starts.

antipattern.symptom: Session ran 3 hours; final hour produced 1 finding while the first 45 min produced 22.
antipattern.fix: Hard-cap at 60 min; schedule a second session next day if needed.

antipattern.symptom: Findings sit raw in chat for 4 days; nobody triages.
antipattern.root-cause: No observer-triages-live role; ledger never materialised.
antipattern.fix: Assign observer in the kickoff; commit ledger before everyone leaves.
